message.content:
Thoroughly explore the collabspace-web project at D:/project/pt-gitlab/collabspace/collabspace-web/. I need to understand:

1. What tech stack it uses (language, framework, build tool)
2. How to build, run, test, and lint
3. The high-level architecture (modules, packages, key directories)
4. Any configuration files (package.json, tsconfig, webpack, vite, etc.)
5. Key directories and their purposes
6. Read the README.md and any build config files

Be very thorough - check package.json scripts, monorepo structure (workspaces), and explore src/ directories for architecture patterns.
